フフフ、酒場はいつも賑やかですね。<br>皆さんの楽しそうな声を聞いていると、私:
Fufufu, the tavern is always so lively, is it not? Hearing everyone's
cheerful voices invigorates me as well.
教会では聞けない、皆さんの本当の声が、ここでは聞こえてくるんです。<br>そうい:
Here, I can hear everyone's true voices—the kind you never hear at
church. Their worries and complaints are also important heartfelt voices.
いつでも神は、頑張る方のお味方です。神の導きに従い、<br>皆さんの背中を少しだ:
God always supports those who do their best. Following God's
guidance, my humble duty is to give everyone a nudge in the right direction.
すいません、私ばかり喋ってしまいまして。<br>司令官様もお疲れじゃありませんか:
I am sorry, I have been doing all the talking. Lord Commander, are you
not tired? You cannot fool me, you know.
さて、今日は難しいお話はナシにしましょう。<br>たまには私に、司令官様の愚痴も:
Now then, let us avoid difficult topics today. For a change, let me
hear plenty of your complaints too, Lord Commander.
